zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Gaylord於1499年出生在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯時，他的父親John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield25歲，母親Julia Ann Le Targe25歲。他於1527年與Johanne Bickman在英國英格蘭薩默塞特比特明斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1546年3月25日在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特享年47歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Gaylord于1499年出生在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯时，他的父亲John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield25岁，母亲Julia Ann Le Targe25岁。他于1527年与Johanne Bickman在英国英格兰薩默塞特比特明斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1546年3月25日在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特享年47岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Gaylord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern, of Norman origin): variant of Gaylard altered by folk etymology, from the Old French and Middle English personal name Gaillart, Gallard, Galliard, representing either the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard (composed of elements meaning ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + ‘hard, firm, resilient, strong’) or Old French gaillard, gaillart ‘vigorous, powerful, strong’. Alternatively, from Middle English gaillard, galiard ‘brave, strong, valiant’, also ‘lively, gay, gaily dressed’.
Altered form of Gaylard, itself an Anglicized form of French Gaillard , which was brought to England by the Huguenots.
In some cases also an Americanized form of French   Gaillard  .

variants.name: Gaillard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Philippe, Pierre, Andre, Andree, Ketly, Marcel, Mirlande, Monique.
French: nickname from gaillard ‘vigorous, strong’ (ultimately from Celtic galia ‘strength’). This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gailhard, composed of the elements gail ‘powerful, lusty, cheerful’ + hard ‘hard, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Gaylord was born in 1499, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield, was 25 and his mother, Julia Ann Le Targe, was 25. He married Johanne Bickman in 1527, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 25 March 1546, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Pitminster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Gaylord est né en 1499, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Julia Ann Le Targe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Johanne Bickman en 1527, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1546, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Gaylord 1499 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield 25 und seine Mutter Julia Ann Le Targe 25. Er hat 1527 in Pitminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Johanne Bickman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 25. März 1546 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Pitminster, Somerset, England und wurde in Pitminster, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Gaylord è nato il nel 1499 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Julia Ann Le Targe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Johanne Bickman nel 1527, nel Pitminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 25 marzo 1546, nel Pitminster, Somerset, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Pitminster, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Gaylordが1499年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfieldは25歳，母Julia Ann Le Targeは25歳であった。1527年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターでJohanne Bickmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1546年3月25日にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで47歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトピトミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Gaylord(이)가 1499년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Julia Ann Le Targe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피트민스터에서 Johanne Bickman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1546년 3월 25일 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Gaylord nasceu em 1499, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Julia Ann Le Targe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanne Bickman em 1527, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1546, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Gaylord родился в 1499 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Julia Ann Le Targe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanne Bickman в 1527 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 25 марта 1546 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Gaylord nació en 1499, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, John Antonie Gaylord of  Langford  Budfield, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Julia Ann Le Targe, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Johanne Bickman en 1527, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1546, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
